title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Martin Omander from Google Cloud Tech presents five planning tactics for using Antigravity 2.0 on complex enterprise codebases: breaking repo walls to link multiple repositories, organizing hierarchical coding standards, containing blast radius through sandboxing, using voice input for requirements gathering, and having the agent interrogate requirements before execution. The advice treats the AI agent as a digital intern requiring careful setup and guardrails before autonomous code generation begins.
